summary: Tested Meta MMS TTS integration for Khmer voice. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). POST /api/projects/proj_1154fafbf78d/regenerate-segment/0 and /1 return 200 with audio data. Frontend: Voice Picker modal shows KHMER section at top with 3 voices (Piseth FREE, Meta AI AI badge, Sreymom FREE). Editor page loads correctly with 2 segments showing Khmer translated text.

issues: Login button shows 'Please wait...' indefinitely in Playwright - may be timing issue with API response

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test@voxidub.com / test123 returns 200
Project has 2 segments with Khmer translations
Project actor has mms_khmer voice configured
Regenerate endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Editor page loads with 2 segments showing Khmer text
Voice Picker modal opens when clicking Browse button
KHMER section appears at top of Voice Picker
Meta AI (Boy) voice shows AI badge (cyan-600)
critical_code_review_comments: React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in Editor component - minor issue
test_credentials: Email: test@voxidub.com, Password: test123, Test Project: proj_1154fafbf78d
seed_data_creation: Used existing MMS test project proj_1154fafbf78d with mms_khmer voice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meta MMS TTS integration tested and working. The facebook/mms-tts-khm model is stored at /root/.cache/mms-tts-khm and generates 16kHz Khmer audio. Voice Picker modal shows KHMER at top with 3 voices: Piseth (dara) FREE, Meta AI (mms_khmer) AI badge, Sreymom (sophea) FREE. Session token is stored in sessionStorage (not localStorage). Login via Playwright may require token injection due to timing issues.
